import json
with open('articles/2026/03/19/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
        content = (a.get('content','') or '').lower()[:5000]
        for kw in ['eritrea eswatini', 'afcon 2027 qualifier', 'eritrea host', 'mass grave', 'dozens bodies', 'sudan hospital', 'teaching hospital', 'sudan state attack']:

                print(f'[{kw}] {a.get(\"title\",\"\")[:160]}')
                print(a.get('content','')[:500])
                print('---')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -20

blocks.content:
[15-point] TCU backs up bold talk with last‑second winner over Ohio State in NCAA tourney opener
David Punch provided some bulletin-board material this week when he told the Columbus Dispatch that TCU would beat Ohio State "nine times out of 10" because of its athleticism.
On Thursday, Punch and the Horned Frogs backed up his bold talk.
Punch delivered a textbook entry pass to Xavier Edmonds, who converted a layup to beat the shot clock with 4.3 seconds left as No. 9 seed TCU held off a furious second-half rally by eighth-seeded Ohio State for a 66-64 victory to open the first round of the 
---

        title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
        content = (a.get('content','') or '').lower()[:5000]

blocks.content:
[kiryat shmona] Israel says Haifa oil refinery hit in Iranian missile attack
Israel says an oil refinery in the northern city of Haifa has been struck in an Iranian missile attack, but no “significant” damage was reported, as Tehran continues to retaliate across the region for strikes on its energy infrastructure.
In a statement on Thursday, Energy Minister Eli Cohen said power was briefly disrupted as a result of the attack on the Oil Refineries Ltd facility before being restored for most customers.
